parameters.ema_reversal_definition: next EMA-9/EMA-21 crossover opposite to current EMA trend
parameters.gann_target_definition: bars/pct/direction to the next confirmed Gann swing extremum

leakagePolicy: Targets are labels/ground-truth ONLY and must never be used as Tibot features or live-inference columns. TA v3 marks gann_swing_change/top/bottom as target-only, feature_safe=false; gann_swing/gann_count are causal and feature-safe, but any target DERIVED from future swings here is a label only. Gann and EMA-reversal targets use future events and REQUIRE purged + embargoed splits.
nullPolicy: Terminal/unavailable labels remain NaN. No filling.

gannEventContract.direction_convention: top extremum => next 'down'; bottom extremum => next 'up'
gannEventContract.availability: Gann events are indexed at extremum bar t but observable at close_of_bar_t+1 (lookahead_bars=1). Effective label horizon for a row = bars_to_next_swing + 1.
gannEventContract.policy: Future confirmed Gann swing extrema used as labels only. Never use as features.

purgeEmbargoRequiredBars: max(12, (max target_gann_bars_to_next_swing observed) + 1, max target_reversal_bars_ema_9_21 observed)
sameCandleDualTouchPolicy: first_passage_12 emits 'unknown' on same-bar dual touch.

windowing.note: All 25 predictive target columns + OHLCV are exported. Only rows are windowed (most-recent N per timeframe; browser-safe). OHLCV is joined from the certified TA-v3 source on timestamp == open_time_utc (row-for-row alignment asserted). No values recomputed; cells copied verbatim from the certified CSVs (NaN/''→null).
